title: Recipe Viewer
description:
RecipeViewer is a simple & lightweight plugin that shows every way to create an item—all through one simple command.

Just type /recipe <item> to open a clean, intuitive GUI displaying all crafting, smelting, and stonecutting options for that item.
body:
## Overview: RecipeViewer is a simple & lightweight plugin that shows crafting and smelting recipes using one simple command. Just type ```/recipe ``` to open a clean GUI and see all possible ways to make that item, without unlocking it in the recipe book. It supports shaped and shapeless crafting, smelting (furnace, blast furnace, smoker), and stonecutting—everything shown clearly and interactively. _**Every recipe, one command**_

## Examples: ### Command: ``` /recipe beacon ``` ### Output: ![Beacon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jHNypJUt/images/06ecac33650b7f03dd18993c8d81bac00594a8eb.png) --- ### Command: ``` /recipe torch ``` ### Output: ![Torch Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jHNypJUt/images/3fb5fbbeabbb6e3af1120a877bbd3aed8f17f459.png) --- ### Command: ``` /recipe netherite_axe ``` ### Output: ![Netherite Axe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jHNypJUt/images/97eaacd3dac51242a958f4a0661583331f490275.png) --- ### Command: ``` /recipe baked_potato ``` ### Output: ![Baked Potato Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jHNypJUt/images/3b389587057ae3126651f447eaba3e454ce81d79.png) --- ### Command: ``` /recipe iron_ingot ``` ### Output: ![Iron Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jHNypJUt/images/d1237e72e25eabad6af37b338d0aad7382b3d97d.png) ---
